name: Semolina Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the semolina and all-purpose flour together in a bowl.
2. Gradually add up to 1/2 cup of water, stirring continuously until the mixture holds together in a ball.
3. Cover the dough and let it rest for half an hour to an hour.
4. Divide the dough into four equal parts.
5. Roll each portion through the pasta machine, one at a time.
